LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER WAYNE CHUNG'S HEARING FOR PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 8, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE IS DENIED. THE HEARING WAS FAIR; THE BOARD DID NOT PROCEED IN EXCESS OF ITS JURISDICTION OR COMMIT ABUSE OF ITS DISCRETION. THE COURT DID NOT FIND THE BOARD TO BE BIASED IN ITS DECISION MAKING. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO DISMISS PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE FILED BY PETITIONER CHUNG MD, WAYNE

LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO DISMISS PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PETITIONER MUST PROCEED WITH REASONABLE DILIGENCE IN THE PROSECUTION OF HIS ACTION. PETITIONER MUST SET THIS PETITION FOR HEARING TO BE HELD NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 1, 2013 IN DEPARTMENT 302 AT 9:30 A.M.. PETITIONER MUST FILE AND SERVE HIS MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF HIS PETITION, AND LODGE THE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD WITH THE COURT IF HE HAS NOT DONE SO ALREADY. PETITIONER MUST PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF ALL OF THESE PAPERS WITH DEPARTMENT 302 ON THE DAY THEY ARE FILED OR LODGED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: DIANA CHEN, CSR # 11312 = (302/MJM)

calendar.matters:
Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Mar-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Wayne Chung, M.D., Tel. 415.650.0926, petitioner and moving party;
David Carr, Esq., Deputy Attorney General, Tel. 415.703.5538, for respondent and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the court ruled as follows: PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE is denied. The hearing was fair; the Board did not proceed in excess of its jurisdiction or commit abuse of its discretion. The Court did not find the Board to be biased in its decision making. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Petition For Writ Of Mandate;
Off Calendar Nov-28-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - WAYNE CHUNG, TEL. NO. 350-0926, PETITIONER APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Dismiss Petition For Writ Of Mandate is Denied without prejudice. Petitioner must proceed with reasonable diligence in the prosecution of his action. Petitioner must set this petition for hearing to be held no later than February 1, 2013 in Department 302 at 9:30 a.m.. Petitioner must file and serve his memorandum of points and authorities in support of his petition, and lodge the administrative record with the Court if he has not done so already. Petitioner must provide courtesy copies of all of these papers with Department 302 on the day they are filed or lodged. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR # 11312 = (302/MJM)
